Case Study • Various

How we helped Aegistek Corporation Limited in Thailand Secures EcoVadis Gold Medal for Sustainability Excellence with Growlity’s Advisory

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Aegistek Corporation Limited (Aegistek), a leader in Semiconductor Industry, has achieved the esteemed EcoVadis Gold Medal for its exceptional Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance. This remarkable accomplishment highlights Aegistek’s commitment to sustainability, responsible business practices, and corporate social responsibility.

This milestone has been made possible with Growlity’s domain expertise and tailored consulting services, guiding Aegistek through the rigorous EcoVadis assessment. With a focus on sustainability best practices, data-driven ESG strategies, and comprehensive reporting frameworks, Growlity played a crucial role in strengthening Aegistek’s ESG performance, ensuring compliance with global sustainability benchmarks.

Elevating ESG Performance with a Strategic Approach

EcoVadis, a globally recognized sustainability rating platform, evaluates companies across four key pillars: Environment, Labor & Human Rights, Ethics, and Sustainable Procurement. Aegistek’s Gold Medal status places it among the top 5% of companies assessed worldwide, reinforcing its leadership in responsible business practices.

“Achieving the EcoVadis Gold Medal is a testament to our relentless dedication to sustainable development. Growlity’s in-depth expertise and strategic guidance have been invaluable in enhancing our ESG initiatives and driving impactful change across our operations,” said Mr. Pongtas Suwannalai,
HR Supervisor – Aegistek Corporation Limited

Growlity: Your Trusted Partner for ESG & Sustainability Advisory

With a track record of empowering global corporations to achieve top-tier sustainability ratings, Growlity specializes in EcoVadis assessments, ESG strategy development, carbon footprint reduction, regulatory compliance, and sustainable supply chain management. Our expert-led consulting approach helps businesses navigate complex sustainability landscapes, maximize ESG scores, and gain a competitive edge in the market. 

“We take immense pride in supporting Aegistek Corporation Limited on their sustainability journey and helping them secure this distinguished recognition. At Growlity, we are committed to driving ESG excellence through customized strategies that deliver measurable impact and long-term business value,” said Mr. Shwetang Kapadia, Vice President – ESG Advisory.

Unlock Your Path to Sustainability Leadership

As sustainability expectations from investors, regulators, and stakeholders continue to rise, achieving an EcoVadis Gold Medal enhances brand reputation, strengthens stakeholder trust, and unlocks new business opportunities.

If your company is looking to improve its ESG performance, enhance sustainability credentials, and achieve higher EcoVadis ratings, Growlity is here to guide you every step of the way.

Contact us today to explore how our expert advisory services can help you achieve sustainability excellence and stand out in the global marketplace
